import time, sys
import serial
port='/dev/cu.usbmodem101'
end=time.time()+25
with serial.Serial(port, 115200, timeout=0.5) as ser:
    while time.time()<end:
        data=ser.readline()
        if data:
            sys.stdout.write(data.decode('utf-8','replace'))
            sys.stdout.flush()
PY

tasks.label: serial-read-esp32s3-101-raw
tasks.command:
stty -f /dev/cu.usbmodem101 115200 raw -echo && python3 - <<'PY'
import os, select, sys, time
fd = os.open('/dev/cu.usbmodem101', os.O_RDONLY | os.O_NONBLOCK)
end = time.time() + 25
try:
    while time.time() < end:
        ready, _, _ = select.select([fd], [], [], 0.5)
        if fd in ready:
            data = os.read(fd, 4096)
            if data:
                sys.stdout.write(data.decode('utf-8', 'replace'))
                sys.stdout.flush()
finally:
    os.close(fd)
PY

tasks.command:
/tmp/cardano-zkvms-pyserial/bin/python - <<'PY'
import serial, time
PORT='/dev/cu.usbmodem101'
BAUD=115200

def read_for(ser, seconds=2.0):
    end=time.time()+seconds
    out=b''
    while time.time()<end:
        chunk=ser.read(4096)
        if chunk:
            out+=chunk
    text=out.decode('utf-8','replace')
    return '\n'.join(line for line in text.splitlines() if line.strip())

sequences = [
    ('dtr_true_rts_pulse_true_false', True, [(True,0.25),(False,2.0)]),
    ('dtr_true_rts_pulse_false_true', True, [(False,0.25),(True,2.0)]),
    ('dtr_false_rts_pulse_true_false', False, [(True,0.25),(False,2.0)]),
    ('dtr_false_rts_pulse_false_true', False, [(False,0.25),(True,2.0)]),
]
for name, dtr, rts_steps in sequences:
    print(f'=== {name} ===')
    with serial.Serial(PORT, BAUD, timeout=0.05) as ser:
        ser.dtr=dtr
        time.sleep(0.1)
        ser.reset_input_buffer()
        for rts, delay in rts_steps:
            ser.rts=rts
            time.sleep(delay)
        print(read_for(ser, 2.5) or '<no output>')
    time.sleep(0.5)
PY

tasks.command:
/tmp/cardano-zkvms-pyserial/bin/python - <<'PY'
import asyncio, hashlib, pathlib, time
from bleak import BleakClient, BleakScanner
SERVICE='7b7c0001-78f1-4f9a-8b29-6f1f1d95a100'
CONTROL='7b7c0002-78f1-4f9a-8b29-6f1f1d95a100'
DATA='7b7c0003-78f1-4f9a-8b29-6f1f1d95a100'
STATUS='7b7c0004-78f1-4f9a-8b29-6f1f1d95a100'
key_bytes=pathlib.Path('/tmp/openvm-mcu-evm.key').read_bytes()
proof_bytes=pathlib.Path('/tmp/openvm-mcu-evm.proof').read_bytes()
proof_sha=hashlib.sha256(proof_bytes).hexdigest()
PAYLOAD_BYTES=176
queue=asyncio.Queue()

def text(data):
    return bytes(data).decode('utf-8', errors='replace').rstrip('\x00')

def notify(_, data):
    queue.put_nowait(text(data))

async def find_device():
    for attempt in range(1, 8):
        print(f'scan attempt {attempt}', flush=True)
        devices = await BleakScanner.discover(timeout=5, return_adv=True)
        for device, adv in devices.values():
            name = device.name or adv.local_name or ''
            uuids = [u.lower() for u in (adv.service_uuids or [])]
            if name == 'OpenVM MCU' or name == 'nimble' or SERVICE in uuids:
                print(f'found address={device.address} name={name!r} services={uuids}', flush=True)
                return device
    raise RuntimeError('OpenVM MCU service not found')

async def write_text(client, value):
    print(f'control -> {value}', flush=True)
    await client.write_gatt_char(CONTROL, value.encode(), response=True)

async def send_blob(client, kind, blob, label):
    total=(len(blob)+PAYLOAD_BYTES-1)//PAYLOAD_BYTES
    print(f'sending {label}: {len(blob)} bytes in {total} chunks', flush=True)
    for seq, offset in enumerate(range(0, len(blob), PAYLOAD_BYTES)):
        chunk=blob[offset:offset+PAYLOAD_BYTES]
        packet=bytearray(4+len(chunk))
        packet[0]=kind
        packet[1]=seq & 0xff
        packet[2]=(seq >> 8) & 0xff
        packet[3]=1 if offset+len(chunk) >= len(blob) else 0
        packet[4:]=chunk
        await client.write_gatt_char(DATA, packet, response=False)
        if (seq + 1) % 10 == 0 or seq + 1 == total:
            print(f'  {label}: {seq + 1}/{total}', flush=True)

async def wait_verdict(client):
    terminal=('verified','rejected','error')
    deadline=time.monotonic()+20*60
    last=None
    while time.monotonic() < deadline:
        try:
            current=text(await client.read_gatt_char(STATUS))
            if current and current != last:
                print(f'status <- {current}', flush=True)
                last=current
            if current.startswith(terminal):
                return current
        except Exception as exc:
            print(f'status read error: {exc}', flush=True)
        try:
            current=await asyncio.wait_for(queue.get(), timeout=2.0)
            if current and current != last:
                print(f'status <- {current}', flush=True)
                last=current
            if current.startswith(terminal):
                return current
        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
            pass
    raise TimeoutError('timed out waiting for MCU verdict')

async def main():
    print(f'key={len(key_bytes)} proof={len(proof_bytes)} proof_sha={proof_sha}', flush=True)
    device=await find_device()
    async with BleakClient(device, timeout=30) as client:
        print(f'connected={client.is_connected}', flush=True)
        await client.start_notify(STATUS, notify)
        print(f'status <- {text(await client.read_gatt_char(STATUS))}', flush=True)
        await write_text(client, f'START {len(key_bytes)} {len(proof_bytes)} {proof_sha}')
        await send_blob(client, 1, key_bytes, 'key')
        await send_blob(client, 2, proof_bytes, 'proof')
        await write_text(client, 'COMMIT')
        verdict=await wait_verdict(client)
        print(f'VERDICT {verdict}', flush=True)
        await client.stop_notify(STATUS)
        if not verdict.startswith('verified'):
            raise SystemExit(2)
asyncio.run(main())
PY
